name: Sky Take-Out
description: A comprehensive food delivery platform with management system and mini-program application.
descriptionZh: 专为餐饮企业定制的软件产品，包括系统管理后台和小程序端应用。主要功能有营业统计、订单管理、菜品管理、套餐管理、后台启动和运营控制。
longDescription: The platform includes features such as business statistics, order management, dish management, combo management, backend startup, and operational control.

name: Apartment Lease System
description: An apartment rental platform with mobile client and admin management system.
descriptionZh: 公寓租赁平台项目，包含移动端和后台管理系统。主要功能有公寓展示、租赁管理、维修申请、用户账号管理和支付系统集成。
longDescription: The system includes features for apartment display, lease management, maintenance requests, user account management, and payment system integration.
